title: Welcome
body: Posts live in the repository’s posts/ folder (one JSON file each), with posts/manifest.json listing them. To add or change posts, edit those files on GitHub or locally, then commit and push.
zhBody: 文章保存在仓库的 posts/ 目录下（每篇一个 JSON），由 posts/manifest.json 索引。要发表或修改文章，请在 GitHub 或本地编辑这些文件，然后提交并推送。
